title: posture-emitter Helm values
description: Configuration schema for the `posture-emitter` service. Generated from packages/common/src/config/schema.ts — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `npm run gen:helm-schema` from the repository root.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the service container. Keys map 1-to-1 to the environment variables consumed by the service.

NODE_ENV.description: Deployment environment. Used by logging and CORS to pick safe defaults.

POSTURE_EMITTER_ENABLED.description: Set to "true" to activate the posture emitter. When false (default) all emit calls are no-ops.

POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS.description: Comma-separated list of plugin names to fan out to. Supported values: stdout, defender-cspm, security-hub, scc. Default: stdout.

POSTURE_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS.description: Milliseconds between periodic posture refreshes. Default: 300000 (5 min).

POSTURE_DURABLE_QUEUE_PATH.description: File path for the SQLite durable queue. Required in production (NODE_ENV=production). Must be on a persistent volume. Example: /data/posture.db

POSTURE_DURABLE_POLL_INTERVAL_MS.description: Milliseconds between durable queue worker polls. Default: 5000.

POSTURE_DURABLE_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: Maximum delivery attempts per event before it is dead-lettered. Default: 5.

POSTURE_DURABLE_BATCH_SIZE.description: Number of events processed per poll tick. Default: 25.

AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID.description: Azure Subscription ID. Required when POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS includes defender-cspm.

AWS_ACCOUNT_ID.description: AWS account ID. Required when POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS includes security-hub.

AWS_REGION.description: AWS region for Security Hub calls. Required when POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS includes security-hub.

SECURITY_HUB_PRODUCT_ARN.description: ARN of the Security Hub product to post findings to. Required when POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS includes security-hub.

GCP_SCC_SOURCE_NAME.description: Full resource name of the Security Command Center source. Required when POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS includes scc. Example: organizations/123/sources/456

GCP_PROJECT_ID.description: GCP project ID for Security Command Center calls. Required when POSTURE_EMITTER_PLUGINS includes scc.
